Profile.title: Profile
Profile.description: The user's core profile, tracker of currency, total experience, level, name, and current boss HP.

xp.description: Current total XP of the user

bossHp.description: The remaining HP of the current boss in the arena

nextEvolution.description: The next evolution group or name

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this profile was last updated

District.title: District
District.description: Represents one of the user's three districts of mastery: Knowledge, Artisan, or Engineering.

id.description: ID of the district (e.g. d1, d2, d3)

level.description: The district level for the user

xp.description: User's current XP inside this specific district path

maxXp.description: XP required to level up the district

pathName.description: E.g. Scholar Path, Creator Path, Builder Path

perAction.description: The string illustrating XP gained per trigger

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last progress update

Quest.title: Quest
Quest.description: An active or completed daily quest. Represents single custom or default task to be done.

title.description: Title of the task to complete

xp.description: XP reward for finishing this quest

color.description: Styling color tag of the quest card

completed.description: Check whether the quest has been marked completed today

InventoryItem.title: InventoryItem
InventoryItem.description: An item or gear that the user currently possesses, unlocked or bought through the shop.

itemId.description: Unique id of the catalog item

rarity.description: Rarity category (common, uncommon, rare, epic, legendary)

category.description: Category like weapon, armor, relic, pet

purchasedAt.description: Timestamp when this item was bought

Oracle.title: Oracle
Oracle.description: Daily royal decrees, stressor alerts, and magical blessings delivered by the Oracle.

date.description: The date of the oracle reading (formatted YYYY-MM-DD)

decrees.description: List of 1-3 decrees generated that act as checklist items linked to daily habits.

stressor.description: The recurring stressor identified, or null

blessing.description: A motivational phrase in fantasy/regal tone

transcription.description: Filtered transcribed morning declaration voice note

completed.description: Whether all decrees for the day are complete

completedDecrees.description: Completion states of each decree item

linkedQuests.description: The customized target daily quest IDs mapped to each decree, optional

/profiles/{userId}.description: Access the user's shared profile and battle metrics.

/profiles/{userId}/districts/{districtId.description: The list of three districts of mastery for this specific profile.

/profiles/{userId}/quests/{questId}.description: The user's list of current daily quests and status.

/profiles/{userId}/inventory/{itemId}.description: The weapons, relics, gear and status skins the user has bought.

/profiles/{userId}/oracle/{date}.description: Daily oracle parchment record for history and progress tracking.
